summary: Iteration 22: Profil Tab Testing Complete. All features verified: Admin info, Agency info, Links & QR Codes, Settings, Logout. Fixed API endpoint bug in profile.tsx (was calling non-existent /api/agencies/{id}, changed to /api/agencies).

bugs_fixed.issue: API call to non-existent endpoint /api/agencies/{user.agency_id} returned 405 Method Not Allowed
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to /api/agencies and use first result from array (admin sees own agency)

profil_tab_navigation.details: Profil tab visible in horizontal scrollable tab bar, navigates correctly to /agency-app/profile

admin_info_section.details: Shows admin name (Admin Geneva), email (admin-geneva@logirent.ch), and 'Admin Agence' badge with shield icon

mon_agence_section.details: Shows agency info after API fix: Nom (LogiRent Geneva), Adresse (Geneva, Switzerland), Téléphone (+41 22 000 0000), Email agence (admin@logirent.ch)

liens_qr_codes_section.details: Shows App Client card (with agency slug URL) and App Admin Agence card (with /admin-login URL). Each has Copier, Partager, QR Code buttons

qr_code_client_modal.details: Opens modal with 'QR Code - App Client' title, globe icon, QR code image, URL, Copier/Partager buttons

qr_code_admin_modal.details: Opens modal with 'QR Code - App Admin' title, shield icon, QR code image, admin-login URL, Copier/Partager buttons

settings_section.details: Shows 'Mode sombre' theme toggle and 'Configuration GPS Navixy' menu item

logout_button.details: Red 'Se déconnecter' button - clicking logs out and redirects to /admin-login

home_page_no_links.details: Home page (Accueil) no longer shows Liens & QR Codes section - correctly moved to Profile page

context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile tab fully functional. All agency links and QR codes work. API fix applied: profile.tsx now calls /api/agencies (list) instead of non-existent /api/agencies/{id}. Agency info displays correctly after fix.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: profile.tsx called GET /api/agencies/{user.agency_id} but this endpoint doesn't exist (only GET /api/agencies exists which returns array of agencies). Fix: Changed to call /api/agencies and use res.data[0] to get the admin's own agency.
